Payments Configuration

v3 · platform-team
payments
api_key cutoff enabled environment fee metadata mode refund_window retries webhook
10 fields · 8 types
Generated by decree-docs

payments

payments.api_key string · password
⟳ Write-once ⊘ Sensitive

Gateway API key.

🔒 ● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● value masked
payments.cutoff time
Nullable

Daily settlement cutoff.

Payments Enabled

payments.enabled bool

Master switch for payment processing.

Default true
payments.environment string
⊙ Read-only

Deployment environment label.

Constraints
  • Min length: 2
  • Max length: 32
  • Pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$
payments.fee number
Nullable

Per-transaction fee rate.

Default 0.01 Tags billingrates
Examples
0.02
high
0.99
low
0.01
Promotional rate
Constraints
  • Minimum: 0
  • Maximum: 1
Fee guide ↗
payments.metadata json

Free-form gateway metadata.

Constraints
  • JSON Schema: (see schema definition)
payments.mode string
⚠ Deprecated
↪ Deprecated — use payments.environment instead.

Processing mode.

Default test
Constraints
  • Enum: live, test
payments.refund_window duration

Window during which refunds are accepted.

Default 72h
payments.retries integer

Delivery attempts per webhook event.

Default 3
Constraints
  • Exclusive minimum: 0
  • Exclusive maximum: 10

Webhook URL

payments.webhook url

Endpoint receiving payment events.

Constraints
  • Allowed schemes: https, sftp
